import io
import string
import list

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn format_list(_ prefix: String, _ items: List<Int>) -> String
  mut s = prefix
  mut first = true
  for x in items
    if first
      s = "#{s}#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      s = "#{s} #{x}"
    end
  end
  s
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []

mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut val = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if is_digit(b)
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
    val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    in_num = true
    sign = -1
    val = 0
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    in_num = true
    sign = 1
    val = 0
  else
    if in_num
      let actual = sign * val
      if actual % 2 == 0
        evens = list.push(evens, actual)
      else
        odds = list.push(odds, actual)
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let actual = sign * val
  if actual % 2 == 0
    evens = list.push(evens, actual)
  else
    odds = list.push(odds, actual)
  end
end

print(format_list("evens=", evens))
print(format_list("odds=", odds))
